= concat

Concatenates an array value with one or more argument arrays.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.foo.concat(this.bar, this.baz)

# In:  {"foo":["a","b"],"bar":["c"],"baz":["d","e","f"]}
# Out: {"foo":["a","b","c","d","e","f"]}
----
